name: Two Button Bounce
author: Poki
description: Two Button Bounce is an exciting update to the fun puzzle game One Button Bounce. In this dynamic update, you'll encounter not one, but two characters constantly running back and forth on a platform. The goal is to find the right moment to jump and bounce off walls to solve the puzzle and make your exit. The secret is collaboration! One character needs to help the other to get the key. As long as one character reaches the exit, you pass the level! You know what is the best? You can play the game with your friends! Invite your buddies to bounce into action together! How to play Two Button Bounce ? Player 1: W to jump and bounce off of walls Player 2: Up arrow to jump and bounce off of walls Reset: R Back: Esc Who created Two Button Bounce? Two Button Bounce is created by Robert Alvarez. They have other thinking games on Poki : Blockins , One Button Bounce , Ledge Throw , Platform Countdown , Hop Warp , Plactions , Jumping Clones , Big Tall Small , Teleport Jumper , Block Toggle , Isotiles , Chessformer , Resizer and Time Clones ! How can I play Two Button Bounce for free? You can play Two Button Bounce for free on Poki. Can I play Two Button Bounce on mobile devices and desktop? Two Button Bounce can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Two Button Bounce with my friend? Yes! Two Button Bounce is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
